name: servicenow-impact-mcp-monorepo
description: ServiceNow Impact Analysis — Monorepo (Backend API + MCP Server + Dashboard)

scripts.setup: npm install && cd shared && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../mcp && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: cd shared && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:frontend
scripts.clean: cd shared && npm run clean && cd ../backend && npm run clean
